items.definition_en: A rear reflector is a safety device that reflects light on the back of a bicycle or scooter.
items.example_en: Remember to check the rear reflector before riding at night.

items.definition_en: A valve cap covers the valve on a tire to protect it from dirt.
items.example_en: He lost the valve cap from his bicycle tire.

items.definition_en: A frame lock is a tool for securing a bicycle by locking the frame.
items.example_en: The frame lock makes it easy to secure your bike quickly.

items.definition_en: A drop bar is a curved bicycle handlebar often used on road bikes.
items.example_en: Drop bars give you more positions for your hands while riding.

items.definition_en: A quick release is a lever that allows fast removal of a wheel or seat from a bicycle.
items.example_en: Use the quick release to remove the front wheel easily.

items.definition_en: A chain guard is a cover that keeps the bicycle chain protected and clothes clean.
items.example_en: The chain guard stopped my jeans from getting dirty.

items.definition_en: A spoke is a rod that connects the hub to the rim on a bicycle wheel.
items.example_en: One of the spokes on my wheel is bent.

items.definition_en: A shock absorber reduces the impact and vibration while riding.
items.example_en: Good shock absorbers make mountain biking more comfortable.

items.definition_en: A front light is a lamp on the front of a bicycle or scooter for visibility.
items.example_en: You must use your front light at night for safety.

items.definition_en: A pannier is a bag attached to a bicycle for carrying belongings.
items.example_en: She packed her lunch in the bicycle pannier.

items.definition_en: Grip tape is a material applied to handlebars or scooter decks for better hold.
items.example_en: The grip tape on my scooter helps prevent slipping.

items.definition_en: Training wheels are small wheels that help children learn to ride a bicycle.
items.example_en: My daughter uses training wheels on her first bike.

items.definition_en: A mudguard is a curved cover over a bicycle wheel to keep mud from splashing.
items.example_en: The mudguard kept me dry during the rain.

items.definition_en: A crankset is the part of a bicycle that connects the pedals and transfers power to the chain.
items.example_en: He cleaned the crankset to improve the bike's performance.

items.definition_en: A rim is the outer edge of a bicycle wheel where the tire is mounted.
items.example_en: The rim needs to be straight for safe riding.

items.definition_en: A step-through frame allows the rider to get on and off easily.
items.example_en: A step-through frame is good for commuting in a dress or skirt.

items.definition_en: A kickplate is the flat part on a scooter where you place your foot.
items.example_en: Stand with both feet on the kickplate for stability.

items.definition_en: A child seat is a seat attached to a bicycle for carrying small children.
items.example_en: I mounted a child seat so I can cycle with my son.

items.definition_en: A frame bag is a storage bag attached to the frame of a bicycle.
items.example_en: He kept his tools in the frame bag during the trip.

items.definition_en: A balance bike has no pedals and helps children learn balance before using a regular bike.
items.example_en: My son learned quickly on his balance bike.
